command:
echo "======== PHASE 1: GATHER (before we delete anything) ========"

echo "=== Sakura: exact config keys we need to preserve (non-telegram) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REM1'
echo "--- hermes-gateway.service (non-telegram env vars) ---"
grep -v TELEGRAM /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service | grep -v "^#"

echo ""
echo "--- config.yaml: model + ollama settings ---"
grep -E "^model:|^providers:|^  provider:|^  default:|^  ollama|^  base_url|ollama_host" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -15

echo ""
echo "--- config.yaml: allowed_users (non-telegram) ---"
grep -E "allowed_users|user_id" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -5
REM1

echo ""
echo "=== Remy: exact config keys we need to preserve (non-telegram) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REM2'
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
# Print everything except telegram channel
cfg = dict(d)
ch = dict(cfg.get('channels',{}))
ch.pop('telegram', None)
cfg['channels'] = ch
# Show key settings
print('model primary:', d['agents']['defaults'].get('model'))
print('ollama baseUrl:', d.get('models',{}).get('providers',{}).get('ollama',{}).get('baseUrl'))
print('channels (non-telegram):', list(ch.keys()))
print('gateway port:', d.get('gateway',{}).get('port'))
print('gateway bind:', d.get('gateway',{}).get('bind'))
"
REM2
